list: The Annie Armstrong Easter Offering goal is $2500.00. The offering envelopes are in the back of the pews.
On the construction plan in the foyer are renovation options. Please write your preferred option on a piece of paper and drop it in the collection plate.
We will take up a special offering for the restroom remodel this morning. The current estimate is $30,000.
April 13: Women on Mission will meet at 6:00 PM. Linda Baker will present the program, and Barbara Hoskins will provide the food.
April 25: Men’s Discipleship Breakfast hosted by Mark Deaton.
